status_notes.review_only: Planning or governance only. No question, runtime, reviewed-bank, or protected-preview gate is opened.
status_notes.source_extraction_verified: Source-derived extraction accuracy is verified, but this is still not teacher approval or runtime approval.
status_notes.teacher_approved_input_candidate: Teacher input approval is being prepared, but no protected preview or runtime use is implied.
status_notes.teacher_approved_for_protected_preview: Teacher-approved for locked input-list work only, not runtime or reviewed-bank activation.
status_notes.protected_preview_only: Review-only preview lane. Runtime, reviewed-bank, and student-facing use remain closed.
status_notes.reviewed_bank_candidate: Candidate for later reviewed-bank work only. Runtime and student-facing use remain closed.
status_notes.runtime_ready: Already backed by the live runtime catalog. This does not convert any review-only Standard 3 data into runtime truth.

canonical_skills.plain_english_definition: Choose a safe, literal meaning for one isolated Hebrew word.
canonical_skills.student_task_definition: Match one Hebrew word to its basic meaning.
canonical_skills.evidence_required_for_next_status: Teacher-approved input evidence would still be required before any Step 4 locked-input or protected-preview use.
canonical_skills.review_notes: Runtime-backed engine-extension row. Standard 3 and enrichment data remain review-only.

canonical_skills.plain_english_definition: Identify whether a target word is functioning as a noun or a verb.
canonical_skills.student_task_definition: Classify a basic part of speech for one Hebrew word.
canonical_skills.evidence_required_for_next_status: Teacher-reviewed Standard 3 scope would be needed before any teacher-approved input lane uses this as a standards-backed skill.
canonical_skills.review_notes: Runtime lane is broader than the external standard analogue, so standards linkage stays conservative.

canonical_skills.plain_english_definition: Break a word into visible prefixes, core letters, and suffixes.
canonical_skills.student_task_definition: Show which parts of the word are added letters and which are core letters.
canonical_skills.evidence_required_for_next_status: Teacher-approved examples would be required before using this as a locked standards lane.
canonical_skills.review_notes: This is a general runtime parsing lane and is not the same thing as Standards teacher approval.

canonical_skills.plain_english_definition: Identify whether a word is singular or plural.
canonical_skills.student_task_definition: Tell whether the word is singular or plural.
canonical_skills.evidence_required_for_next_status: Needs explicit teacher-approved input scope and source-backed exemplars before any protected-preview work.
canonical_skills.review_notes: Used here to keep noun-feature enrichment claims separate from runtime readiness.

canonical_skills.plain_english_definition: Identify grammatical gender for a target word.
canonical_skills.student_task_definition: Tell whether the word is masculine or feminine.
canonical_skills.evidence_required_for_next_status: Needs explicit teacher-reviewed scope and token-level source examples.
canonical_skills.review_notes: Present to anchor Standard 3 noun/adjective feature work without pretending the runtime already serves it.

canonical_skills.plain_english_definition: Identify a clear three-letter shoresh and connect it to meaning.
canonical_skills.student_task_definition: Choose the shoresh of a word when the letters are visible and defensible.
canonical_skills.evidence_required_for_next_status: Teacher-approved shoresh input lists would still be needed before any Step 4 protected-preview work.
canonical_skills.review_notes: Runtime lane exists today, but Standard 3 shoresh evidence remains review-only unless separately approved.

canonical_skills.plain_english_definition: Recover a weak or dropped-letter shoresh when the form still supports a clear answer.
canonical_skills.student_task_definition: Find the shoresh even when one root letter is not fully visible.
canonical_skills.evidence_required_for_next_status: Any standards-backed or teacher-approved use would need separate reviewed examples and approval evidence.
canonical_skills.review_notes: This keeps the runtime dropped-letter subset explicit without reading it back into Standard 3 approval.

canonical_skills.plain_english_definition: Identify the basic meaning carried by visible attached prefix letters.
canonical_skills.student_task_definition: Tell what the prefix adds to the word or phrase.
canonical_skills.evidence_required_for_next_status: Teacher-approved visible-form examples would still be required for a locked Standard 3 prefix lane.
canonical_skills.review_notes: This is the closest live runtime analogue for Standard 3 prefix meaning work.

canonical_skills.plain_english_definition: Recognize which prefix letter is attached before asking for the meaning.
canonical_skills.student_task_definition: Name the visible prefix on the word.
canonical_skills.evidence_required_for_next_status: Needs teacher-approved exact visible forms before any protected-preview lane is opened.
canonical_skills.review_notes: Engine-extension row that keeps the live prefix form lane explicit.

canonical_skills.plain_english_definition: Use future-tense prefix markers as person and tense clues.
canonical_skills.student_task_definition: Notice how a leading letter helps show future-tense or related verb information.
canonical_skills.evidence_required_for_next_status: Needs teacher-selected examples before any protected-preview use.
canonical_skills.review_notes: A narrow runtime-backed marker lane, not blanket approval for all Standard 3.07 verb work.

canonical_skills.plain_english_definition: Recognize first-person suffix meaning on a defended form.
canonical_skills.student_task_definition: Tell what a first-person suffix means on the word.
canonical_skills.evidence_required_for_next_status: Needs exact teacher-approved examples for any locked protected-preview use.
canonical_skills.review_notes: Current runtime meaning lane only; review-only standards work remains separate.

canonical_skills.plain_english_definition: Recognize second-person suffix meaning on a defended form.
canonical_skills.student_task_definition: Tell what a second-person suffix means on the word.
canonical_skills.evidence_required_for_next_status: Needs exact teacher-approved examples for any locked protected-preview use.
canonical_skills.review_notes: Current runtime meaning lane only; review-only standards work remains separate.

canonical_skills.plain_english_definition: Recognize third-person suffix meaning on a defended form.
canonical_skills.student_task_definition: Tell what a third-person suffix means on the word.
canonical_skills.evidence_required_for_next_status: Needs exact teacher-approved examples for any locked protected-preview use.
canonical_skills.review_notes: Used to map the existing suffix lane conservatively.

canonical_skills.plain_english_definition: Recognize pronominal suffix meaning on nouns, particles, or similar forms.
canonical_skills.student_task_definition: Tell which person the pronominal suffix refers to.
canonical_skills.evidence_required_for_next_status: Needs exact teacher-approved examples before any protected-preview input-list use.
canonical_skills.review_notes: Maps the live pronominal suffix lane without opening any standards review gate.

canonical_skills.plain_english_definition: Track possession through suffixes or related construct structures.
canonical_skills.student_task_definition: Explain how the form shows possession.
canonical_skills.evidence_required_for_next_status: Needs teacher-reviewed examples and clearer source-backed constraints.
canonical_skills.review_notes: Included so smichut and possession planning do not get collapsed into the live runtime suffix lanes.

canonical_skills.display_name: Match pronoun form to grammatical function
canonical_skills.plain_english_definition: Differentiate pronoun roles and how they align to the clause.
canonical_skills.student_task_definition: Match a pronoun-related clue to its grammatical role.
canonical_skills.evidence_required_for_next_status: Needs explicit teacher approval for any standards-backed protected-preview lane.
canonical_skills.review_notes: Useful runtime analogue, but still narrower than full referent-tracking work.

canonical_skills.plain_english_definition: Identify which noun or actor a pronoun points back to.
canonical_skills.student_task_definition: Explain who or what the pronoun refers to in context.
canonical_skills.evidence_required_for_next_status: Needs explicit teacher-approved referent examples and review notes before any later gate opens.
canonical_skills.review_notes: Added to stop referent-tracking from being confused with the narrower runtime pronoun-function lane.

canonical_skills.plain_english_definition: Recognize clear past-tense verb forms.
canonical_skills.student_task_definition: Tell whether a verb is past tense.
canonical_skills.evidence_required_for_next_status: Needs exact teacher-approved inputs before any protected-preview use.
canonical_skills.review_notes: Keeps verified extraction and enrichment evidence separate from runtime/teacher approval.

canonical_skills.plain_english_definition: Recognize clear present-tense or participle-style present forms.
canonical_skills.student_task_definition: Tell whether a verb is functioning as a present-tense form.
canonical_skills.evidence_required_for_next_status: Needs exact teacher-approved inputs before any protected-preview use.
canonical_skills.review_notes: Used to anchor unresolved present-style verb enrichment and standards references conservatively.

canonical_skills.plain_english_definition: Recognize clear future-tense verb forms and nearby marker clues.
canonical_skills.student_task_definition: Tell whether a verb is future tense.
canonical_skills.evidence_required_for_next_status: Needs exact teacher-approved inputs before any protected-preview use.
canonical_skills.review_notes: This is the conservative anchor for unresolved future/jussive enrichment items.

canonical_skills.plain_english_definition: Identify a command form and relate it to nearby future-tense morphology when defensible.
canonical_skills.student_task_definition: Recognize that a verb is giving a command.
canonical_skills.evidence_required_for_next_status: Needs exact teacher-approved examples before any protected-preview use.
canonical_skills.review_notes: Runtime-ready because it already exists in the engine, not because Standard 3 review data approved it.

canonical_skills.plain_english_definition: Track who acts and what receives the action in a clause.
canonical_skills.student_task_definition: Identify the subject or object in context.
canonical_skills.evidence_required_for_next_status: Needs teacher-approved examples before any standards-backed preview use.
canonical_skills.review_notes: Live runtime has two narrower lanes; the standard remains broader and review-only.

canonical_skills.plain_english_definition: Spot which visible letter is doing grammatical work on the word.
canonical_skills.student_task_definition: Choose the letter that adds the grammatical clue.
canonical_skills.evidence_required_for_next_status: Needs exact teacher-approved examples before any protected-preview use.
canonical_skills.review_notes: This is a narrow runtime marker lane and should stay separate from broader standards approval claims.

canonical_skills.display_name: Translate a short phrase as a unit
canonical_skills.plain_english_definition: Read a short Hebrew phrase together as one meaning unit.
canonical_skills.student_task_definition: Translate a short phrase without breaking it into isolated words only.
canonical_skills.evidence_required_for_next_status: Teacher-approved input lists would still be required before any protected-preview work uses phrase rows.
canonical_skills.review_notes: Important boundary skill: live runtime uses phrase translation, but current verified source-to-skill rows stay source-only.

canonical_skills.plain_english_definition: Use taamim and pausal structure to group and parse a pasuk.
canonical_skills.student_task_definition: Use taamim to help divide the pasuk into meaning units.
canonical_skills.evidence_required_for_next_status: Needs explicit teacher-approved examples and taamim-specific source support before any later gate opens.
canonical_skills.review_notes: Included to give Standard 3.09 a canonical anchor without changing runtime behavior.

canonical_skills.display_name: Distinguish the direct-object-marker use of et
canonical_skills.plain_english_definition: Separate the direct-object marker function of et from other readings.
canonical_skills.student_task_definition: Explain whether et is marking the direct object or functioning differently.
canonical_skills.evidence_required_for_next_status: Needs explicit teacher-approved examples and exact wording boundaries before any later gate opens.
canonical_skills.review_notes: Added because this meaning/function distinction appears in Standard 3 material but does not belong in current runtime truth.

canonical_skills.display_name: Group a phrase and adjust Hebrew word order
canonical_skills.plain_english_definition: Group phrase parts and translate them in a natural English order when needed.
canonical_skills.student_task_definition: Read the Hebrew phrase structure instead of translating word by word in Hebrew order.
canonical_skills.evidence_required_for_next_status: Needs teacher-reviewed wording boundaries and approved examples before any later gate opens.
canonical_skills.review_notes: Added so syntax grouping is not collapsed into the simpler runtime phrase translation lane.

canonical_skills.plain_english_definition: Identify advanced nikud or syllable-rule patterns in a conservative review-only way.
canonical_skills.student_task_definition: Notice the advanced nikud rule that affects how the word is read.
canonical_skills.evidence_required_for_next_status: Needs explicit teacher-approved examples and stronger source-verified rule evidence before any later gate opens.
canonical_skills.review_notes: Added because Standard 3.10 is broader than any current runtime nikud lane.
